case_title: RAFAEL ALATORRE VS. DERF BUTLER et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$150.00) SERVED AUG-23-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT THE TRAVELERS INDEMNITY COMPANY

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,500.00 FILED BY ALATORRE, RAFAEL AS TO DEFENDANT BUTLER, DERF THE TRAVELERS INDEMNITY COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-15-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-09-2014 - CONTINUED FOR DEFECTIVE PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-12-2014 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF MUST RE-SERVE BOTH DEFENDANTS PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-15-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON BOTH DEFENDANTS TO OCT-09-2014 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$150.00) SERVED AUG-23-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BUTLER, DERF

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO NEW PROOF OF SERVICE ON BOTH DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
